perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a graphic representation of the Google search engine logo under a magnifying glass; this is a non-live-action graphic overlay. (2) A male character appears in a circular inset at the bottom right and then transitions to a full-screen shot; he wears a flat cap and glasses, gesturing with his hands as he speaks. (3) Transitions to screen-recording footage of the ChatGPT interface showing a text prompt being typed and a search button being clicked. (4) The screen shows a map of New York City and a list of sushi restaurants appearing as search results. (5) Fast-paced stock footage of a digital globe and a person wearing a VR headset is shown briefly. (6) The video concludes with the male character speaking to the camera while holding his hands up in an explanatory gesture.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, medium-tempo electronic background music begins immediately and continues throughout. A male voice speaks in a fast, energetic, and clear tone in Mandarin. (2) As the visual transitions to a screen recording, rhythmic mechanical keyboard typing sound effects (SFX) are layered over the music. (3) The speaker's volume remains consistent, maintaining a narrative flow while explaining technical features. (4) A soft digital 'click' sound effect is heard when a UI element is interacted with visually. (5) The music stays consistent until the end, where the male speaker ends with a rising inflection suggesting a question.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: 'Google 搜尋引擎' (Google Search Engine) appears at the start. (2) Hook Text: 'Google 霸主地位不保!?' (Google's dominant status is not guaranteed!?) with a skeptical tone. (3) Functional Text: 'OpenAI 宣布', '讓所有人免費使用' (OpenAI announces, let everyone use for free) in an informative tone. (4) Decorative Text: 'ChatGPT 有獨特對話式搜索' (ChatGPT has unique conversational search) emphasizing a key feature. (5) Hook Text: '沒有討人厭的廣告' (No annoying ads) in a persuasive tone. (6) CTA Text: '你想用用看嗎?' (Do you want to try using it?) as a closing question.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Hook -> Feature Announcement -> Interface Demo -> Comparison with Competitor -> Benefit Summary -> CTA

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 male presenter (Tim) is the only person appearing in the frame.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A middle-aged male with short hair, wearing thick-rimmed glasses, a grey sweatshirt, and a brown/plaid flat cap.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The background switches between a plain grey studio wall for the presenter and various digital screenshots of search engine interfaces and stock digital graphics.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Evidence -> Comparison -> Benefit -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to inform the audience about the new 'Search' feature in ChatGPT by OpenAI. It uses a comparative approach, highlighting how ChatGPT's conversational search might challenge Google's dominance by offering a more direct, conversational experience without ads, ultimately inviting user engagement by asking if they would like to try it.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video is a tech news commentary/report on a new feature release by OpenAI, rather than a paid advertisement for a product.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Presenter Tim's signature flat cap and the '3ctim' branding watermark in the corner.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video uses a vertical format optimized for social media (Short-form video), utilizing fast cuts and text overlays to keep the audience's attention during technical explanations.
